name: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (The) Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th Interest in a Share of Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series A
summary: The Goldman Sachs Group Inc. Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th Interest in a Share of Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series A represents a fractional ownership in a series of preferred stock issued by Goldman Sachs. These preferred shares have specific features, including a floating interest rate and non-cumulative dividend payments. As a depositary share, it simplifies trading and ownership of the underlying preferred stock.
